strict.rationale_for_score: The summary is fluent and coherent but suffers from severe relevance issues. It only extracts the first two sentences of the source text, completely omitting the study's main conclusion (the link between early antibiotics and obesity), the proposed mechanism (gut bugs), expert warnings, and broader context about the obesity epidemic and antibiotic resistance. By ignoring the core message, it fails to summarize the article effectively.

lenient.rationale_for_score: The summary is factually consistent and coherent with the source text.
